matches.match_rationale: Time series forecasting on historical disbursement cycles directly addresses cash gap forecasting.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A campus-level cash flow forecasting dashboard predicting aid inflows 30-90 days out.

matches.match_rationale: Manual tracking and exception handling maps directly to task automation.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An automation agent matching incoming funds to open award records, applying credits, and flagging exceptions.

matches.match_rationale: Disbursement scheduling is a constraint satisfaction and scheduling problem.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A disbursement scheduling optimizer minimizing cash gaps and student payment deadline violations.

matches.match_rationale: Sponsor disbursement data arrives in incompatible formats needing normalization.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An ingestion layer accepting sponsor remittance files in any format and mapping them to internal student IDs.
